lines.english: Give them up, and sleep in intuitive peace and poise.
Pauree:
YAYYA: Burn away duality and evil-mindedness.
Yaya: Go, and seek the Sanctuary of the Saints;
Yaya: One who weaves the One Name into his heart,
with their help, you shall cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਯਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਹਾਰੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: yayaa janam na haareeai gur poore kee ttek |
lines.english: Yaya: This human life shall not be wasted, if you take the Support of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਹ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹੀਅਰੈ ਏਕ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak tih sukh paaeaa jaa kai heearai ek |14|
lines.english: O Nanak, one whose heart is filled with the One Lord finds peace. ||14||
Does not have to take birth again.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਉਪਦੇਸਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪੀਐ ਨੀਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur poorai upadesiaa naanak japeeai neet |1|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has taught me, O Nanak, to chant His Name continually. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਬਸਿ ਰਹੇ ਈਤ ਊਤ ਕੇ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: antar man tan bas rahe eet aoot ke meet |
lines.english: The One who dwells deep within the mind and body is your friend here and hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰਿ ਛਿਅ ਛਾਡਿ ਚਲਿਓ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eih bikhiaa din chaar chhia chhaadd chalio sabh koe |
lines.english: This poison shall last for only a few days; everyone must depart, and leave it behind.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਤਾਸੁ ਕਉ ਜੋ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin simarahu taas kau jo ant sahaaee hoe |
lines.english: Night and day, meditate in remembrance on the One who will be your Help and Support in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਕਛੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਲੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: grih banitaa kachh sang na leea |
lines.english: Household, wife, and other things shall not go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾ ਕੋ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਧੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaa ko maat pitaa sut dheea |
lines.english: Who is our mother, father, son and daughter?
So gather that wealth which shall never perish,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਤੇ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak te te bahur na aaeaa |15|
lines.english: - O Nanak, they do not have to endure reincarnation again. ||15||
In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, those who sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy
so that you may go to your true home with honor.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਕੁਲੀਨ ਚਤੁਰ ਮੁਖਿ ਙਿਆਨੀ ਧਨਵੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: at sundar kuleen chatur mukh ngiaanee dhanavant |
lines.english: He may be very handsome, born into a highly respected family, very wise, a famous spiritual teacher, prosperous and wealthy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਰਤਕ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: miratak kaheeeh naanakaa jih preet nahee bhagavant |1|
lines.english: but even so, he is looked upon as a corpse, O Nanak, if he does not love the Lord God. ||1||
Pauree:
He may practice inhaling, exhaling and holding the breath.
NGANGA: He may be a scholar of the six Shaastras.
He may practice spiritual wisdom, meditation, pilgrimages to sacred shrines and ritual cleansing baths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਨਿ ਨਹੀ ਹੇਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam sang man nahee hetaa |
lines.english: But if he does not enshrine love for the Lord's Name within his heart,
He may cook his own food, and never touch anyone else's; he may live in the wilderness like a hermit.
Even an untouchable pariah is superior to him,
then everything he does is transitory.
O Nanak, if the Lord of the World abides in his mind. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁੰਟ ਚਾਰਿ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕੀ ਰੇਖ ॥
lines.translit: kuntt chaar deh dis bhrame karam kirat kee rekh |
lines.english: He wanders around in the four quarters and in the ten directions, according to the dictates of his karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਦੂਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਖਿਓ ਲੇਖ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sookh dookh mukat jon naanak likhio lekh |1|
lines.english: Pleasure and pain, liberation and reincarnation, O Nanak, come according to one's pre-ordained destiny. ||1||
Salok:
KAKKA: He is the Creator, the Cause of causes.
Nothing can be done a second time.
Pauree:
The Creator Lord does not make mistakes.
No one can erase His pre-ordained plan.
He Himself has set His own play in motion.
While He causes others to wander miserably in the wilderness.
To some, He Himself shows the Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਤ ਖਰਚਤ ਬਿਲਛਤ ਰਹੇ ਟੂਟਿ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: khaat kharachat bilachhat rahe ttoott na jaeh bhanddaar |
lines.english: People continue to eat and consume and enjoy, but the Lord's warehouses are never exhausted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤ ਅਨੇਕ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਹਿ ਸੁਮਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har japat anek jan naanak naeh sumaar |1|
lines.english: So many chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; O Nanak, they cannot be counted. ||1||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਦੀਨੋ ਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੀਨੋ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: jo jo deeno su naanak leeno |17|
lines.english: Whatever He gives, O Nanak, that is what we receive. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਖਾ ਖੂਨਾ ਕਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਥ ਕੈ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: khakhaa khoonaa kachh nahee tis samrath kai paeh |
lines.english: KHAKHA: The All-powerful Lord lacks nothing;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੇਨਾ ਸੋ ਦੇ ਰਹਿਓ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਹ ਤਹ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo denaa so de rahio bhaavai teh teh jaeh |
lines.english: whatever He is to give, He continues to give - let anyone go anywhere he pleases.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰਚੁ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਇਆ ਭਗਤਨ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: kharach khajaanaa naam dhan eaa bhagatan kee raas |
lines.english: The wealth of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is a treasure to spend; it is the capital of His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਮਾ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਅਨਦ ਸਹਜ ਜਪਤ ਰਹਹਿ ਗੁਣਤਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: khimaa gareebee anad sehaj japat raheh gunataas |
lines.english: With tolerance, humility, bliss and intuitive poise, they continue to meditate on the Lord, the Treasure of excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਲਹਿ ਬਿਗਸਹਿ ਅਨਦ ਸਿਉ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਹੋਤ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: kheleh bigaseh anad siau jaa kau hot kripaal |
lines.english: Those, unto whom the Lord shows His Mercy, play happily and blossom forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦੀਵ ਗਨੀਵ ਸੁਹਾਵਨੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਮਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sadeev ganeev suhaavane raam naam grihi maal |
lines.english: Those who have the wealth of the Lord's Name in their homes are forever wealthy and beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣਿਆ ਪੂਰੀ ਤਿਨਾ ਪਰੀ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak jo prabh bhaaniaa pooree tinaa paree |18|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are pleasing to God become perfectly successful. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਦੁ ਨ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਡਾਨੁ ਤਿਹ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: khed na dookh na ddaan tih jaa kau nadar karee |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with the Lord's Glance of Grace suffer neither torture, nor pain, nor punishment.
